---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What is the user-facing problem this would solve? Describe the situation
*before* proposing the implementation.

## Proposed solution

How would you approach it? A rough sketch is fine — exact design happens in
the PR review.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why they were rejected.

## Impact

- Which subsystem does this touch? (graph nodes / retrieval / evaluation /
  cache / frontend / infra)
- Does it change the public API surface (`/api/...`)?
- Does it change the pipeline semantics (hallucination gate, correction loop,
  web fallback)?
- Are new environment variables required?

## Additional context

Links to related issues, papers, or external systems that informed the
proposal.
